hard_requirements: ARGOS compatibility remains metadata/contract-ready only
no ARGOS dependency
no cross-imports
no ARGOS bridge build in this layer
read-only manifest first remains the future integration path
ARGOS cannot bypass Content Engine gates
Content Engine must remain operational without ARGOS
creativity may propose structures but must not output final publishable content in this layer
campaign context must remain metadata/review-oriented
narrative assets must be treated as governed draft candidates, not final assets
creative freedom cannot bypass security, monetization or maturity gates
if Content Engine fails, ARGOS may register health status only
if ARGOS fails, Content Engine may mark ARGOS disconnected only
no cross-system invasive repair
no infinite interrogation loops
no cascade failure
bridge future must be health-check/status-only before any request/response bridge
ethical persuasion is allowed as structure
manipulation, deception, fear pressure and sensitive audience exploitation must block
marketing psychology must remain bounded by evidence, audience safety and human review
digital marketing context must be tagged as campaign, funnel, awareness, trust, conversion or retention metadata
current layer remains design/governance only
promotion by evidence only
no autonomy escalation without safety, metrics, stability, need and rollback/recovery posture
maturity_level_required_before_draft_creation must be planned
human_review_required must remain true for initial governed drafts
future draft candidates must include expected_metric_metadata
learning_objective and growth_decision_context must be representable
no growth decision can be treated as validated without metrics/evidence
future optimization must be evidence-based, not assumed
monetization_intent must be explicit
income objective must be metadata, never a guarantee
commercial claims require evidence or human review
false guarantees, unrealistic income promises, false scarcity and false urgency must block
stable real income is the strategic objective but not a permission to fabricate outcomes
every future draft object must include channel_or_domain_id
domain identity, tone, audience and offer/value context must be explicit
Finca San Mateo, cacao, arriendos, Bravi, BramViss, digital channels A/B/C/D, websites and future brands must be supported as governed domains
cross-domain contamination must block
social channels and business domains must not share uncontrolled tone, policy or claims
publishability_score must exist in future implementation
hard block threshold required for final/near-final content
caption final, publication-ready script, ready-to-post copy, final CTA and final campaign text must block
governance-only examples must be clearly non-final and non-publishable
final_output_allowed must remain false until future publication governance closure
fail-closed on missing evidence
fail-closed on conflicting permissions
fail-closed on output scope mismatch
protected roots no-touch
manual current, brain, reports-brain, queue data, metrics, assets and publication roots remain blocked
no source/test mutation in annex
implementation plan only remains next
